alerts.headline: Blizzard Warning issued February 23 at 3:13AM EST until February 24 at 7:00AM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Blizzard conditions. Additional snow accumulations between
14 and 21 inches. Winds gusting as high as 75 mph.

* WHERE...Portions of eastern and southeastern Massachusetts and
Rhode Island.

* WHEN...Until 7 AM EST Tuesday.

* IMPACTS...Visibilities may drop below 1/4 mile due to falling and
blowing snow. The strong winds and weight of snow on tree limbs
may down power lines and could cause sporadic power outages.
Whiteout conditions are expected and will make travel treacherous
and potentially life-threatening. Travel could be very difficult
to impossible. Areas of blowing snow could significantly reduce
visibility. The hazardous conditions could impact the Monday
morning and evening commutes. Very strong winds could cause
extensive tree damage.

nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Heavy Snow And Areas Of Blowing Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow and areas of blowing snow. Cloudy, with a high near 31. North wind 23 to 35 mph, with gusts as high as 59 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of 10 to 14 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Snow Likely And Areas Of Blowing Snow then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow likely and areas of blowing snow before 10pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 21. Northwest wind 13 to 23 mph, with gusts as high as 41 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New snow accumulation of around one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 31. Northwest wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow after 5am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 14. West wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow before 10am, then rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 39. South wind 6 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New snow accumulation of 1 to 2 inches possible.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 10pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 26. Southwest wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Light Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain between 2pm and 5pm, then a chance of snow. Mostly sunny, with a high near 38. Southwest wind 7 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Snow then Rain And Snow Likely
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow before 9pm, then rain and snow likely between 9pm and 11pm, then rain and snow likely between 11pm and 5am, then a chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 29. South wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain and snow before 3pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 41. West wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 26. West wind around 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 43. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 30. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly sunny, with a high near 42. West wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of snow after 8pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 21. Northwest wind around 10 mph.
